response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (The audio track consists of instrumental BGM with no vocal performances). 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON correctly identified the absence of vocal music; manual translation was applied to prominent on-screen text elements (Visual Events). 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to the appearance and duration of the main concert title card and the attendee 'Attention' notice. The rapidly scrolling fan messages were treated as non-essential background texture and excluded from subtitling.

subtitles.original: ATTENTION ご来場のお客様へ
